assertions.assertion: Operational store or token cleanup is configured with EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800
assertions.rationale: EnableTokenCleanup = true and TokenCleanupInterval = 1800 in AddOperationalStore.

assertions.assertion: RemoveConsumedTokens is set to true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay is set to 300
assertions.rationale: RemoveConsumedTokens = true and ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay = 300 are set.
